mapper.sql: p.id, p.board_id AS boardId, b.name AS boardName, b.slug AS boardSlug, b.tag_name AS boardTagName, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), '社区编辑部') AS authorName, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.badge, ''), b.tag_name) AS badge, p.title, p.summary, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.published_at AS publishedAt

p.id, p.board_id AS boardId, b.name AS boardName, b.slug AS boardSlug, b.tag_name AS boardTagName, p.author_id AS authorId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), '社区编辑部') AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.badge, ''), b.tag_name) AS badge, p.title, p.summary, p.content, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, p.published_at AS publishedAt, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM community_post WHERE status = 1 AND published_at >= #{publishedSince}

SELECT id, board_id, author_id, title, summary, content, badge, status, is_featured, is_pinned, view_count, comment_count, favorite_count, published_at, create_time, update_time FROM community_post WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.is_featured = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM community_post_favorite f INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.id = f.post_id LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY f.update_time DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET board_id = #{boardId}, title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content = #{content}, badge = #{badge}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1
UPDATE community_post SET status = 0, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND status = 1
UPDATE community_post SET view_count = view_count + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE community_post SET favorite_count = CASE WHEN favorite_count > 0 THEN favorite_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND p.published_at >= #{publishedSince} ORDER BY (p.view_count * 1 + p.comment_count * 5 + p.favorite_count * 3) DESC, p.published_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN community_board b ON b.id = p.board_id LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = p.author_id WHERE p.status = 1 AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.badge LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY p.is_pinned DESC, p.published_at DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
